title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 and discusses harness engineering, AI loops, and their applications in regulated industries. The video explores tensions between open and closed source AI models, risks of model shutdowns, and the state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on experience since 2023 in the space.
writeup: Cyril Imhof reviews Claude Fable 5 and explains harness engineering and AI loops, the practice of structuring agents and repeated execution cycles to handle complex tasks. The discussion centers on applications in regulated industries, the tradeoffs between open and closed source foundation models, and the risk that a closed model can be shut down. It also assesses the current state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on the speaker's work in the space since 2023, and touches on multi-agent systems and prompt engineering.
